---
id: event-types-get
title: "Get an event type by its name"
description: "Retrieves details of a specific event type if it exists within the given application. Event types define the structure of emitted events."
sidebar_label: "Get an event type by its name"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/hook-0-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an event type by its name"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/event_types/{event_type_name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves details of a specific event type if it exists within the given application. Event types define the structure of emitted events.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"event_type_name","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"style":"simple"},{"in":"query","name":"application_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"form"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
